steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=6x^2$, and the question asks for $f(8)$. Replace $x$ with $8$ in the function.

steps.title: Evaluate the square
steps.content: Square $8$ first, then multiply by $6$: $$f(8)=6(8)^2=6(64)=384$$ The value of $f(8)$ is $384$. The answer is D.
